svg.text: GSD Plugin — Triple V-Model Gap Analysis
Based on SEI CMU "Using V-Models for Testing" (Firesmith). Colour = GSD coverage.
3rd V (Test Verification) — entirely absent in GSD
GSD has no mechanism to verify tests are correct. Mutation testing, test plan review, and false-positive detection are all missing.
GSD creates artifacts (SPEC, RESEARCH, PLAN) but never tests those models before implementation. The left V column is skipped.
Gap 3 — System vs. User requirements collapsed
SPEC.md conflates user needs and system requirements. No RTM between the two levels exists.
Gap 4 — Subsystem layer missing; bidirectional traceability one-way
No subsystem integration phase. Test failures loop to code fixes, not model revisions — arrows run one way only.
Severity: Blue-dashed = Critical (3rd V) | Red = High | Orange = Medium | Green = Present/Covered
